findings.title: stanford-crfm/helm
findings.description: Holistic Evaluation of Language Models (HELM) is an open source Python framework created by the Center for Research on Foundation Models (CRFM) at Stanford for holistic, reproducible and transparent evaluation of foundation models, including large language models (LLMs) and multimodal models.

findings.title: MMMU-Benchmark/MMMU
findings.description: This repo contains evaluation code for the paper "MMMU: A Massive Multi-discipline Multimodal Understanding and Reasoning Benchmark for Expert AGI"

findings.description: (CVPR2024)A benchmark for evaluating Multimodal LLMs using multiple-choice questions.

findings.description: MedEvalKit: A Unified Medical Evaluation Framework

findings.title: MMStar-Benchmark/MMStar
findings.description: [NeurIPS 2024] This repo contains evaluation code for the paper "Are We on the Right Way for Evaluating Large Vision-Language Models"

findings.description: A Survey on Benchmarks of Multimodal Large Language Models

findings.description: Web2Code: A Large-scale Webpage-to-Code Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Multimodal LLMs

findings.title: EvolvingLMMs-Lab/EASI
findings.description: Holistic Evaluation of Multimodal LLMs on Spatial Intelligence

findings.title: uni-medical/GMAI-MMBench

findings.description: [IJCAI 2025] Image Captioning Evaluation in the Age of Multimodal LLMs: Challenges and Future Perspectives

findings.title: bunnelab/mtbbench
findings.description: MTBBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (LLMs) in complex clinical decision-making scenarios. It focuses on two core challenges in oncology: multimodal integration (e.g., pathology, genomics, radiology) and longitudinal reasoning across patient timelines.

findings.title: CyberChangAn/MultiPriv-PII
findings.description: MultiPriv offers multilingual, multimodal PII entities and prompts for studying privacy risks in LLMs/VLMs. It also supports broader PII-related privacy research in diverse analysis and evaluation settings.
